highlights: Terminal no longer snaps to bottom when clicking in scrolled-up output
OSC 8 hyperlinks now show hover underline across the full link span
Per-repo PR visibility filters: override global draft/conflicting/CI-failing settings per repository
Auto-heal CI toggle restyled to match the rest of the UI

contributions.text: PR visibility filters and viewer PR guarantee
contributions.author: paulovitin

contributions.text: Fix zsh compinit with ZDOTDIR trick
contributions.author: paulovitin

contributions.text: Extract nextDefaultName() to eliminate tab naming duplication
contributions.author: paulovitin

highlights: AI Triage and AI Watchers are now independent experimental features with their own toggles
Watchers support a configurable cooldown to control minimum seconds between fires
AI prompt settings now have explicit Save and Revert to Default buttons
Code editor gains undo/redo, code folding, block selection, bracket auto-close, and CSS color previews
Watchers now correctly attach to PTY sessions and fire as expected
Search and filter inputs no longer get mangled by macOS autocorrect

contributions.text: Dead-key composition (accents, quotes) now works correctly on macOS
contributions.author: paulovitin

highlights: Cmd/Ctrl+F search now works inside HTML previews and plugin panels
App recovers automatically if the main window config is missing or corrupted
File drops from Finder to File Browser now land on the correct panel on Retina displays
Plugin iframes no longer reload twice when pressing Cmd/Ctrl+R
Linux and Windows release builds no longer fail on macOS-only window APIs
UI freeze detector tracks main-thread stalls for diagnostics
Git Panel log now shows the full commit message body when you expand a commit
GitHub login requests fewer permissions (dropped unnecessary read:org scope)
Background repo monitoring is now throttled to prevent file descriptor exhaustion with many repos
Terminal recovers from WebView stalls in 1s instead of 5s
macOS file descriptor limit raised at startup to prevent EMFILE crashes during git operations
Dead terminal tabs now correctly show grey instead of a misleading green indicator
Opt-in off-main-thread terminal renderer keeps input responsive under heavy output
Native-feel smooth scrolling with momentum and a draggable scrollbar
VS Code-style change-overview ruler marks add/modify/delete lines on the editor scrollbar
Extended thinking from Claude Opus 4.7+ now shows live in AI Chat
Define your own "Open in…" launchers; iTerm2 and Tower added as built-ins
Faster git: in-process gix reads with a coalescing cache cut subprocess and FD pressure
Virtualized multi-file diffs and a stat-gated editor poll keep large diffs responsive
Terminal text is now readable on light themes

contributions.text: fixed terminal text being unreadable on light themes
contributions.author: jajugoguma

contributions.text: added release-version checking to the macOS install.sh
contributions.author: jklap
